basic_details.short_information: Banaras Hindu University (BHU) Manager Notification 2026 has been released on 18 May 2026 on the official website of Banaras Hindu University. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the BHU Manager Recruitment 2026. Candidates who possess a Regular 2 year Master of Business Administration (MBA) / 2 Year Post Graduate Diploma in Management (PGDM) from any recognized University or Institute are eligible to apply for these Manager vacancies. The application process for BHU Manager Recruitment 2026 has started and candidates can submit their application via email until 10 June 2026. Candi

qualification.education_qualification: Regular 2 year Master of Business Administration / 2 Year Post Graduate Diploma in Management from any recognized University or Institute.
qualification.details: Regular 2 year Master of Business Administration / 2 Year Post Graduate Diploma in Management from any recognized University or Institute.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BHU Manager Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
